unresolved_issues: Raw PDF body was not opened for formula-level review.
Capital timing should be reviewed because the paper writes purchases as k_{t+1} while the implementation uses shifted k(-1) production timing.
Implementation cross-check appears to assign eta without declaring it in the parameter list.
Runtime validation was intentionally not performed.
